title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy
scenario: Privacy Policy link from Main Menu > General navigates to Poly Privacy Policy page with close button in upper right corner
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
On the Home screen, tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the upper left corner to open the Main Menu.
In the General settings screen, tap 'Privacy Policy'.
expected: The user is directed to the Poly Privacy Policy page. A close button (X) is present in the upper right corner of the screen. There is no back button (arrow) in the upper left corner.
